hero.title: Whanaketanga Pūmanawa Hinonga
hero.description: Ngā taupānga hinonga mutunga-ki-te-mutunga me ngā anga hou, te hoahoa API-tuatahi, me te tauine kapua-māori.

problem.title: Tāpare Raru Pakihi
problem.subtitle: Te wāhi e ngaro ai te tere, te tahua, me te tīaroaro rautaki o ngā papatono umanga

approach.title: Huarahi Pūkaha
approach.subtitle: Me pēhea tātau e huri ai i ngā whakaritenga rangirua ki ngā pūhara reri whakanao

principles.title: Ngā Mātāpono Hoahoa
principles.subtitle: Ngā whakataunga hoahoa e pupuri ana i ngā pūnaha umanga i te tauine

capabilities.title: He aha tā mātou e hanga ana
capabilities.subtitle: Ngā āheinga whanaketanga pūmanawa whānui

technology.title: Tā mātou Tāpae Hangarau
technology.subtitle: Ngā hangarau hōu, kua whakamātauria mō te tuku hinonga

breakdown.title: Wehenga Ratonga
breakdown.subtitle: He ara hanganga mai i te hura ki te tukunga whakanao pūmau

problem.overview: I te nuinga o te wā ka kawea e ngā tīma hinonga ngā rerengamahi nui i runga i ngā pūnaha kongakonga kongakonga e waihanga ana i ngā wā ārahi roa, ngā raraunga maiorooro, me te hononga ā-ringa utu nui i waenga i ngā tari.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: He aha te nuinga o te wā e kitea ana e ngā kaiārahi
painPoints: Ka horo ngā whakaritenga tuku nā te mea kāore i te whakahaeretia ngā whakamaurutanga puta noa i ngā tīma
Ka tāruatia ngā arorau pakihi uho puta noa i ngā hongere me ngā hua
Mā ngā whakaurunga tuku iho ka whakarewa i ngā āhuahira hōu kia tino mōrearea, kia pōturi hoki
impactSignals: Ka taka te mahi mahere i te wā e nui ake ana te whakapau pūkaha
Ka piki ake ngā hēnga anga atu ki te kiritaki i roto i ngā wā tuku
Ka pōturi te whakataunga nā te pūrongo whakahaere maiorooro

approach.overview: Ka kawea e mātou mā te hura hoahoa-tuatahi, te tukunga ā-kirimana, me te pūkaha tuku mana kia tukuna ai te uara pakihi i roto i ngā āpitihanga matapae.

pillars.title: Whakatauira Rohe me ngā Horopaki Herenga
pillars.detail: Ka whakamaheretia e mātou ngā rohe hei whakawātea i ngā rohenga ratonga hei whakaiti i te hononga whakawhiti-tīma me te whakamārama i te rangatiratanga.

pillars.title: Rautaki Whakaurunga API-Tuatahi
pillars.detail: Ka tautuhi wawe mātou i ngā kirimana pūmau, e whakahohe ana i te whanaketanga whakarara me te whakaurunga haumaru ake ki ngā pūnaha hinonga.

pillars.title: Rerengamahi Tukunga Mārō
pillars.detail: Ka whakamahi mātou i ngā haki āhuahira, ngā takahanga ā-wāhanga, me ngā kēti kounga kia tere te tuku me te kore whakararuraru i te whakanaotanga.

principles.overview: Ko ā mātou whakataunga hoahoa e manakē ana i te roanga o te ora, te mahi, me te rangatiratanga mārama kia noho urutau tonu ai ngā pūhara i te nui o te whānuitanga o te pakihi.

items.title: Ngā Rohenga Ratonga Kōwae
items.detail: Kua pōkaitia ngā āheinga huri noa i ngā rohe pakihi kia noho paetata tonu ai te pānga huringa.

items.title: Whakaurunga ā-Takahanga
items.detail: Ka whakamahia ngā rerengamahi tukutahinga i te wāhi e tīari ana te manawanui latency hei whakapai ake i te manawanui me te wetewete i ngā pūnaha.

items.title: Te mātakitaki mā te Hoahoa
items.detail: Kua tautuhia te aroturuki, ngā inenga, me ngā rangitaki hanganga i mua hei tautoko i ngā mahi pono me te whakahaere SLA.

breakdown.title: Whakahura me te Hoahoa
breakdown.summary: Ka whakamaheretia e mātou ngā manakē pakihi, ngā herenga hangarau, me te hoahoa ūnga i mua i te tīmatanga o te whakatinanatanga.
deliverables: Toa tīaroaro hua me ngā whakaritenga
Mahere hoahoa rongoā
Mahere tuku ā-tohu

breakdown.title: Hanga me te Whakauru
breakdown.summary: Ka whakatinana whakarara ā mātou tīma i ngā āhuahira uho, ngā apa whakauru, me ngā parenga kounga.
deliverables: Whanaketanga āhuahira i roto i ngā sprints auau
API me ngā whakaurunga hunga-tuatoru
Ngā taki whakamātautau aunoa me te takatū tuku

breakdown.title: Whakarewa & Kunenga
breakdown.summary: I muri i te haere-ora, ka whakaūngia e mātou ngā mahi me te tautuhi i te huringa whakapai ake panuku i runga anō i te whakamahinga tūturu.
deliverables: Pukapuka whakataka whakanao
Whakaritenga mahinga me te whaikiko
Maherehuarahi i muri i te whakarewatanga me te whakaputunga whakarei

cta.title: Kua rite koe ki te hanga i tō taupānga panuku?
cta.description: Me hoahoa me te tuku i tētahi rongoā e whakahaere ana i ngā hua pakihi ine.

hero.title: AI, ML & Mōhiohio Pakihi
hero.description: Mai i ngā tauira matapae ki ngā papatohu whakahaere, ka hangaia e mātou ngā pūnaha AI/BI katoa e tautoko ana i ngā whakataunga i te tauine.

problem.title: Tāpare Raru Pakihi
problem.subtitle: He aha ngā umanga whai raraunga e uaua tonu ana ki te whakatau i ngā whakataunga māia

approach.title: Huarahi Pūkaha
approach.subtitle: Me pēhea tā mātou whakahaere i ngā hua raraunga, ngā tauira ML, me ngā rerengamahi BI

principles.title: Ngā Mātāpono Hoahoa
principles.subtitle: Ngā tauira hoahoa raraunga me te tauira mō te mōhiohio whakatau pono

capabilities.title: Ō mātou Āheinga
capabilities.subtitle: Ngā rongoā AI, ML, me BI whānui

technology.title: Tā mātou Tāpae Hangarau
technology.subtitle: Ngā utauta ā-umanga mō te raraunga me te AI

breakdown.title: Wehenga Ratonga
breakdown.subtitle: Me pēhea tātau e neke ai mai i ngā raraunga kongakonga ki te mōhiohio kōeke whakanao

problem.overview: He rite tonu te kohikohi a ngā whakahaere i ngā rōrahi raraunga nui, engari kāore e taea te whakamāori ki te matapae pono, ki ngā whakataunga mahi, ki ngā mahi pakihi ine rānei.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: He aha te nuinga o te wā e kitea ana e ngā kaiārahi
painPoints: He rerekē te arorau pūrongo puta noa i ngā tīma, e hua ana i ngā kōrero KPI papā
Ka noho tonu ngā tauira ki te whakamātautau, ā, e kore rawa e tae ki ngā rerengamahi whakanao
Ko ngā take kounga raraunga e tukituki ana i te whakawhirinaki ki ngā tātaritanga me ngā paemana ā-kaiwhakahaere
impactSignals: He pōturi te huringa whakatau nā te mea e taupatupatu ana ngā tīma i te whaimana raraunga, kaua ko te mahi
Ka noho maiorooro tonu te tika o te matapae me te whakarite i te hauwhā ki te hauwhā
E whakaatu ana ngā pūtea penapena tātaritanga i te whakatamarikitanga iti i waho o ngā rōpū kaitātari motuhake

approach.overview: Ka tukua e mātou ngā pūhara AI me BI hei pūnaha whakanao, te pūkaha raraunga hononga, ngā mahi huringa tauira, me te whakaurunga rerengamahi whakataunga.

pillars.title: Tūāpapa Hua Raraunga
pillars.detail: Ka whakatū ngā hua raraunga tiaro-rohe i ngā tāurunga ka taea te whakamahi anō, te whakahaere, me te kounga tiketike mō te tātaritanga me te ML.

pillars.title: Aunoatanga Huringa Ora MLOps
pillars.detail: Ko te whakangungu, te tukunga, te aroturuki, me te mana mānuku e aunoatia ana kia pono ai ngā tauira i roto i te whakanaotanga.

pillars.title: Whakaurunga Rerengamahi Whakataunga
pillars.detail: Kua tāmau ngā kitenga ki ngā utauta whakahaere me ngā papatohu kia mahi ai ngā tīma i runga i te mōhiohio i roto i ngā tukanga o ia rā.

principles.overview: Ko tā mātou hoahoa AI/BI e manakē ana i ngā raraunga pono, ngā tauira whakamārama, me ngā tauira urunga whakahaere puta noa i te hinonga.

items.title: Ngā Tikanga Ngahuru Takitahi
items.detail: Ka tautuhia ngā KPI takenui i te wā kotahi mā ngā tauira semantic tiritiri hei whakakore i ngā arorau pūrongo papā.

items.title: Ngā Mana Taimautanga Tauira
items.detail: Ko ngā paepae mahinga, te haurapa mānu, me ngā tikanga whakahoki e pare ana i te kounga o te whakataunga i roto i te whakanaotanga.

items.title: Haumarutanga me te Whakahaere mā te Hoahoa
items.detail: Kua tāmautia te rārangi raraunga, te urunga ā-tūranga, me ngā mana rite-arotaupū ki ia paipa.

capabilities: Ngā Tauira Ako Mīhini me ngā Arapae
Ngā Paemana me ngā Pūrongo Power BI

breakdown.title: Tūāpapa Raraunga
breakdown.summary: Ka arotaupū mātou i ngā pūtake, ka tautuhi i ngā kirimana raraunga, me te whakatū i te whakahaere kia tīmata ai ia tauira ki ngā tāurunga pono.
deliverables: Pūtake raraunga me te aromatawai kounga
Pūkaha āhuahira me te whakamahere aronuinga
Tauanga haumarutanga me te whakahaere

breakdown.title: Tukunga Tauira & Tirohanga
breakdown.summary: Ka hangaia e mātou ngā tauira me ngā papatohu whakatau e herea ana ki ngā pātai pakihi me ngā KPI ine.
deliverables: Te whanaketanga tauira me te whakamanatanga
Ngā paemana ā-kaiwhakahaere me ngā pūrongo whakahaere
Urunga rerengamahi whakatau

breakdown.title: MLOps & Whakatamarikitanga
breakdown.summary: Ka whakahaerehia e mātou te tukunga, te aroturuki, me te whakahohe i te tīma kia pono ai ngā putanga i roto i te wā.
deliverables: Ngā arapae tukunga tauira aunoa
Te mānu, te tika, me te aroturuki whakamahinga
Te tukunga atu o te tīma me te pukapuka tākaro whakahaere

cta.title: Panoni i Ō Raraunga ki te Kitenga
cta.description: Hurihia ngā raraunga kongakonga hei mōhiohio mārama, ka taea te mahi.

hero.title: Hoahoa Kapua me te Hanganga
hero.description: Ngā pūhara kapua-maha, te hoahoa pakari, me ngā hanganga tauine i hangaia mō te tipu mo te wā roa.

problem.title: Tāpare Raru Pakihi
problem.subtitle: He aha ngā mahi kapua i tū ai i muri i te ngaru hekenga tuatahi

approach.title: Huarahi Pūkaha
approach.subtitle: Me pēhea mātou e hanga ai i ngā pūhara kapua haumaru, tauine me te mōrea hekenga whakahaere

principles.title: Ngā Mātāpono Hoahoa
principles.subtitle: Ngā whakataunga pūhara e whakataurite ana i te kakama, te manawanui, me te whakahaere

capabilities.title: Ngā Ratonga Kapua
capabilities.subtitle: Hanga, hora, me te tauine i te kapua

breakdown.title: Wehenga Ratonga
breakdown.subtitle: He raupapa mārama mō te hoahoa, te heke, me te whakahaere i ngā pūhara kapua

problem.overview: He maha ngā whakahaere e whakaoti ana i ngā hekenga kapua tuatahi engari kei te mahi tonu pēnei i ngā tīma ā-rohe, me te iti o te kitenga, ngā mana maiorooro, me te pikinga o te whakapau moni.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: He aha te nuinga o te wā e kitea ana e ngā kaiārahi
painPoints: Ka hekea ngā kawenga mahi me te kore mana haumarutanga paerewa me ngā mana whatunga
He tere ake te tipu o ngā utu kapua i te uara pakihi i tukuna
Ka noho ā-ringa tonu te whakarato taiao, ā, ka maiorooro puta noa i ngā tīma
impactSignals: Ngā takanga auau i takea mai i te whirihoranga e neke ana i waenga i ngā taiao
Ka heke te takatū arotaupū nā ngā mahi whakahaere kongakonga
Ko ngā wā ārahi hanganga e whakaroa ana i ngā mahi hua me ngā mahi raraunga

approach.overview: Ka hoahoa mātou i ngā pūhara kapua hei hua, mā te whakamahi i te aunoatanga hanganga, ngā ārai kaupapahere, me ngā ngaru hekenga e hāngai ana ki te tino nui o te pakihi.

pillars.title: Rohe Tauranga hei Waehere
pillars.detail: Kua whakakotahitia te tuakiri, te whatunga, te haumarutanga, me ngā tauanga kaupapahere mō te tukuruatanga me te arotaupū.

pillars.title: Rautaki Hekenga ā-Ngaru
pillars.detail: Ka neke ngā kawenga mahi i ngā wāhanga whakahaere me te raupapatanga mōhio ki te whakawhirinaki me te takatū whakahoki.

pillars.title: SRE + FinOps Koromeke Mahi
pillars.detail: Ka arotakea tahitia ngā tohu whaikiko me te ohaoha wae hei whakapai ake i te wā me te tōtika whakapau.

principles.overview: E manako ana tā mātou tauira hoahoa i ngā hanganga whakapuakitanga, te urunga iti rawa, me ngā pūhara tito e tautoko ana i te tukunga tere o te hua.

items.title: Ngā Tauira Hanganga Kore E Taea te Huri
items.detail: Ka hangaia anōtia ngā taiao mai i te waehere putanga hei whakaiti i te nekeneke me te whakangāwari i te whakaora mahi.

items.title: Tauanga Haumarutanga ā-Taunoa
items.detail: Kua tāmautia ngā mana urunga whirinaki-kore me te whakaū kaupapahere ki ia huringa ora taiao.

items.title: Te Manawanui Mā te Tohatoha
items.detail: Kua hoahoatia ngā kawenga mahi takenui mō te manawanui rahunga rohe-maha, rohe-maha rānei e hiahiatia ana e te pānga pakihi.

breakdown.title: Hoahoa me te Rohe Tauranga
breakdown.summary: Ka tautuhia e mātou te āhua ūnga, ngā ārai, me ngā paerewa pūhara tauanga i mua i te nekehanga o ngā kawenga mahi.
deliverables: Hoahoa hoahoa kapua ūnga
Tuakiri, whatunga, me te tauanga haumarutanga
Ngā ārai utu me te whakatikatika

breakdown.title: Hekenga me te Hanga Pūhara
breakdown.summary: Ka kawea e mātou ngā ngaru hekenga me te whakatū i ngā wae pūhara kapua-māori me te aunoatanga tukurua.
deliverables: Raupapatanga hekenga kawenga mahi
Tatūnga ipu, pūhara kore tūmau hoki
Hanganga hei kōwae Waehere

breakdown.title: Taimautanga & FinOps
breakdown.summary: Ka whakapai ake mātou i te pono whakahaere me te arotau tonu i ngā whakapau kapua i runga anō i te ine waea ora.
deliverables: Ngā SLO, te aroturuki, me ngā rerengamahi takahanga
Te manaakitanga o te manawanui me te whakaoranga mōrearea
Te whakaputunga arotautanga utu me te auau whakahaere

cta.title: Tauine i tō hanganga
cta.description: Hangaia ngā tūāpapa kapua e noho pakari tonu ana i raro i te kawenga o te ao tūturu.

hero.title: DevOps & Pūkaha Pūhara
hero.description: Ngā paipa tuku aunoa, te mātakitaki, me ngā mahi pūhara e whakapai ake ana i te tere me te kore whakahere i te whaikikotanga.

problem.title: Tāpare Raru Pakihi
problem.subtitle: He aha te take i heke ai te tere tuku i te nui o te matatini o te pūhara

approach.title: Huarahi Pūkaha
approach.subtitle: Me pēhea tā mātou whakarite i ngā paipa tuku me te kore pōturi i ngā tīma hua

principles.title: Ngā Mātāpono Hoahoa
principles.subtitle: Ngā tauira pūkaha pūhara e tauine ana i te whaikikotanga me te mana motuhake o te tīma

capabilities.title: Ngā Ratonga DevOps
capabilities.subtitle: Aunoatia, aroturuki, me te arotau i tō huringa ora tuku

technology.title: Ngā Utauta DevOps & Pūhara
technology.subtitle: Mekamekautauta DevOps tino pai rawa atu

breakdown.title: Wehenga Ratonga
breakdown.subtitle: He mahere huarahi ā-ringa mai i ngā pounamu tuku ki te rerenga tuku whakawhirinaki tiketike

problem.overview: He rite tonu te haumi a ngā whakahaere ki ngā utauta CI/CD engari kei te raruraru tonu ki ngā putanga tūkino, ngā whakaaetanga pōturi, me te rangatiratanga kongakonga puta noa i ngā taiao.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: He aha te nuinga o te wā e kitea ana e ngā kaiārahi
painPoints: He rerekē ngā tikanga paipa i ia tīma, e waihanga ana i ngā kēti kounga maiorooro
Ka takaware ngā whakaaetanga tukunga ā-ringa i ngā rārangi wā whakatika me ngā rārangi wā tuku āhuahira
Ka auau ngā mahi whakahaere nā te mea kāore i te oti, i te whakakotahi rānei te ine waea
impactSignals: Kei te piki haere tonu te wā ārahi mō ngā huringa ahakoa te whakapau aunoatanga
Hurihia ngā taraiwa mokatere rahunga i roto i ngā wā tuku rōrahi tiketike
Ka whakapeka te hua o te kaiwhakawhanake nā te whāngai utauta me te whakawhiti horopaki

approach.overview: Ka whakatū mātou i tētahi tauira pūhara kaiwhakawhanake ā-roto me ngā tātauira paipa ka taea te whakamahi anō, te whakahaere ā-kaupapahere, me te mātakitaki huringa ora katoa.

pillars.title: Ngā Tātauira Ararere Koura
pillars.detail: Ko ngā mahere CI/CD ka taea te whakamahi anō e paerewa ana i ngā rerengamahi hanga, whakamātautau, taki haumarutanga, me te tukunga.

pillars.title: Pūhara API & Ratonga-Whaiaro
pillars.detail: Ka whakarato ngā tīma i ngā taiao me te tuku hanganga mā ngā atanga ratonga-whaiaro e whakahaeretia ana.

pillars.title: Ngā Koromeke Urupare Taimautanga
pillars.detail: Ko ngā ia takahanga, te hauora SLO, me te ine waea tukunga e whakamōhio ana i ngā whakapainga tukanga me ngā hoahoa motukore.

principles.overview: Ko tā mātou hoahoa DevOps e whakarārangi ana i te tere tuku ki te whakahaere mā te whakaaunoa i ngā mana me te whakaiti i ngā mahi whakahaere kotahi.

items.title: Ngā Mea Katoa hei Waehere Putanga
items.detail: Ka whakahaeretia ngā arapae, ngā hanganga, me ngā ture kaupapahere i roto i te mana pūtake mō te arotaupū me te tukuruatanga.

items.title: Manatokonga Whakamua
items.detail: Ko ngā taki kounga, haumarutanga, me te mahinga e apa ana puta noa i ngā wāhanga kia kite i te mōrea i mua.

items.title: Te Kawenga Pūhara Tiritiri
items.detail: Ka whakarato ngā tīma pūhara i ngā āheinga huarahi i te wā e pupuri ana ngā tīma hua i te rangatiratanga tuku.

breakdown.title: Aromatawai Pūhara
breakdown.summary: Ka arotakea e mātou tō mekameka tuku pūmanawa o nāianei hei tāutu i ngā wāhi mōrearea me ngā herenga tere.
deliverables: Mahere rerengamahi tukunga o nāianei
Tātari pounamu paipa
Ūnga DevOps maturity roadmap

breakdown.title: Hanga Paipa me te Aunoatanga
breakdown.summary: Ka whakatinanatia e mātou te CI/CD pono, ngā kēti kounga, me te aunoatanga hanganga mō ngā putanga ōrite.
deliverables: Ngā tātauira CI/CD ka taea te whakamahi anō
Aunoatanga hanganga me te taiao
Ngā mana whakamātautau aunoa me te tuku

breakdown.title: Whakahaere & Whakapai Ake
breakdown.summary: Ka whakatū mātou i ngā koromeke mātakitaki me te whakahaere e tautoko ana i te whakapai ake i te tukunga haere tonu.
deliverables: Te aroturuki i ngā paemana me ngā kaupapahere matohi
Tukua ngā pukapuka whakahaere me ngā pukapuka mahi
Ngā ine me ngā arotakenga whakapai haere tonu

cta.title: Whakaterea Tō Tukunga
cta.description: Whakaitihia te whāngai tuku me te whakapai ake i te whaikikotanga me ngā mahi DevOps pakeke.

hero.title: Huringa Mamati me te Rautaki
hero.description: Tautoko tohutohu rautaki me te kawenga hei whakahou i ngā pūhara, ngā tīma, me ngā tauira whakahaere.

problem.title: Tāpare Raru Pakihi
problem.subtitle: Te wāhi e ngaro ai te kaha me te whakaaro nui o ngā papatono panoni

capabilities.title: Ngā Ratonga Tohutohu
capabilities.subtitle: Tohutohu rautaki mō te angitu mamati

approach.title: Huarahi Pūkaha
approach.subtitle: Me pēhea tā mātou whakamāori i te rautaki ki te huringa kawenga, i pūruatia e te hangarau

principles.title: Ngā Mātāpono Hoahoa
principles.subtitle: Ngā kōwhiringa tauira whakahaere me ngā kōwhiringa pūhara e pare ana i ngā putanga panoni

technology.title: Tāpae Hangarau
technology.subtitle: Ngā pūhara me ngā anga e whakamahia ana e mātou hei whakahaere i te panoni

breakdown.title: Wehenga Ratonga
breakdown.subtitle: Te panoni hanganga mai i te whakamāramatanga rautaki ki te uara pakihi ine

problem.overview: I te nuinga o te wā ka tīmata ngā mahi matihiko ki te whāinga kaha, engari kāore e taea te tahuri ki ngā putanga tuku nā te rangatiratanga kāore i te mārama, ngā utauta momotu, me ngā manakē whakataetae.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: He aha te nuinga o te wā e kitea ana e ngā kaiārahi
painPoints: Kua tautuhia ngā mahere panoni engari kāore i whakamāoritia ki te whakahaere tuku
Ka wehe ngā manakē pakihi me ngā pūkaha i muri i ngā huringa whakamahere tuatahi
Ko ngā tauira mahi tuku iho e ārai ana i te whakatamarikitanga o ngā tikanga tuku hua hōu
impactSignals: Ka piki ake te whakapau papatono i te wā e noho papatahi ana te nekehanga KPI rautaki
Ka hapa ngā mahi i ngā wāhi tuku i waenga i te rautaki, te hoahoanga, me te kawenga
Ka wheako ngā tīma i te ngenge huringa me te uara pakihi iti

approach.overview: Ka whakakotahitia e mātou te tohutohu rautaki me te hoahoa tuku, te whakarārangi i te hoahoa tauira mahi, te āheinga pūhara, me te kawenga kawenga huri noa i ngā whāinga ine.

pillars.title: Manakē Roma Uara
pillars.detail: Ka raupapatia e mātou ngā mahi i runga anō i te pānga pakihi ine me ngā herenga whakawhirinaki hangarau.

pillars.title: Hoahoa Tauira Mahi Ūnga
pillars.detail: Kua tautuhia ngā tūranga, te whakahaere, me ngā mana whakatau hei tautoko i te kawenga tere ake puta noa i ngā tīma pakihi me ngā tīma hangarau.

pillars.title: Te Whakahaere Tukunga Kōpaki
pillars.detail: Ka whakahaeretia te kaunuku panoni mā ngā wāhitaki hono-KPI me ngā mana mōrearea taumata-kōpaki.

principles.overview: Ko tā mātou hoahoa panoni e whakahua ana i te whakahōutanga āpiti me te haepapa mārama, me te karo i ngā tuhi anō whakararuraru me te kore whakatikatika pakihi.

items.title: Tīaroaro Āheinga Pakihi
items.detail: Ka whakaritea ngā huringa hangarau huri noa i ngā āheinga e whakamahere hāngai ana ki te moni whiwhi, te kounga o te ratonga, te tōtika utu rānei.

items.title: Rautaki Pūhara Taeatito
items.detail: Ka tīpakohia ngā wae pūhara mō te āheinga hei tautoko i te hekenga ā-wāhanga me te urutaunga tere ake.

items.title: Te Whakahaere me te Tukunga Cadence
items.detail: Kua tāmau ngā wānanga whakataunga me ngā pūwāhi mana ki ngā huringa sprint me ia hauwhā, kāore i whakamahia hei ara takawaenga motuhake.

breakdown.title: Tīaroaro Rautaki
breakdown.summary: We align leadership priorities and digital objectives to create a shared transformation direction.
deliverables: Ngā whāinga panoni me ngā paearu angitu
Te mātauranga āheinga me te aromatawai āputa
Kōpaki mahi manakē

breakdown.title: Mahere Kawenga
breakdown.summary: Ka tautuhia e mātou te tauira whakahaere ūnga, ngā paerewa hoahoa, me te raupapa whakatinanatanga whāwhā.
deliverables: Tauira whakahaere me te hoahoa whakahaere
Paerewa hoahoa hangarau me te tukanga
Mahere huarahi whakatinanatanga ā-wāhanga

breakdown.title: Huringa me te Whakatauranga Uara
breakdown.summary: Ka whakahaere mātou i te whakatamarikitanga, te aroturuki i te nekehanga KPI, me te whakamahine i ngā mahi i runga anō i ngā hua tuku.
deliverables: Mahere whakatamariki me te whakahohe
Te aukati inenga KPI
Whakaputunga arotautanga ia hauwhā

cta.title: Tīmataria tō haerenga panoni
cta.description: Whakatere i te huringa me ngā manakē mārama me ngā mahere tuku ā-ringa.

hero.title: IoT & Edge Computing
hero.description: Ngā pūnaha tūhono mai i te pūrere ki te kapua, me ngā arapae ine me te mōhiohio tapa mō te tauine ahumahi.

problem.title: Tāpare Raru Pakihi
problem.subtitle: He aha i kore ai ngā papatono pūrere-tūhono e tauine ki tua atu i ngā tukunga whakahaurangi

approach.title: Huarahi Pūkaha
approach.subtitle: He pēhea tā mātou hoahoa i ngā pūnaha IoT haumaru, ka taea te whakahaere mai i ngā pūmanawa mārō pūrere ki ngā API kapua

principles.title: Ngā Mātāpono Hoahoa
principles.subtitle: Ngā ture hoahoa tapa-ki-te-kapua mō te whaikiko, te latency, me te whakahaere rererangi

capabilities.title: Ngā Rongoā IoT
capabilities.subtitle: Tūhono, aroturuki, arotau hoki i ō pūrere

technology.title: Tāpae Hangarau IoT
technology.subtitle: Mai i te pūmārō ki te kapua

breakdown.title: Wehenga Ratonga
breakdown.subtitle: He pēhea tā mātou tuku pūnaha tūhono mai i ngā pūrere tapa ki te mōhiohio kapua

problem.overview: I te nuinga o te wā ka kitea e ngā mahi IoT te āheinga hangarau i roto i ngā kaihautū, engari ka hinga i te tauine nā te tūhonotanga koretake, ngā mana rererangi ngoikore, me te urunga kino ki ngā rerengamahi pakihi.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: He aha te nuinga o te wā e kitea ana e ngā kaiārahi
painPoints: Ka noho ā-ringa tonu te urunga pūrere me te whakahaeretanga huringa ora
Ka puta mai i ngā arapae ine waea he raraunga mahi turituri, kāore anō kia oti, kua takaware rānei
Ka whakaurua e ngā whakahōutanga tono mamao me ngā whakahōutanga pūmanawa mārō te mōrea haumaru, haumarutanga hoki
impactSignals: Ka tutuki ngā taiao whakahaurangi, engari he rite tonu te heke o ngā rārangi wā whakanao
Ka urupare ngā tīma mahi āpure ki ngā mahi me te kore kitenga matapae
Kāore e taea e ngā pūnaha pakihi te whakapau tika i te mōhiohio pūrere i te wā tūturu

approach.overview: Ka hoahoa mātou i ngā pūhara IoT hei pūnaha tuari whakahaere, e whakakotahi ana i ngā paerewa wā whakahaere tapa haumaru, te whakaurunga ā-takahanga, me te whakahaere whakahaere i te tauine rererangi.

pillars.title: Whakahaeretanga Huringa Ora Pūrere Haumaru
pillars.detail: Kua aunoatia te whakarato, te tuakiri, te takahuringa pātuhi, me ngā whakahōutanga pūmanawa mārō hei whakaiti i te mōrea mahi.

pillars.title: Hoahoa Ine Waeatanga ā-Takahanga
pillars.detail: Ko ngā arapae roma e whakapūnoa, whakamana, me te ararere i ngā takahanga pūrere mō ngā tātaritanga me te mana i te wā tūturu.

pillars.title: Rererangi Whakahaere Mahi Rererangi
pillars.detail: Ko te aroturuki, te whakatūpato, me ngā rerengamahi tono mamao e whakarato ana i te tirotiro pono puta noa i ngā rawa kua tohaina.

principles.overview: Ko tā mātou hoahoa IoT e whakataurite ana i ngā whakataunga tapa iti-latency me te whakahaere pūtahi, te mātakitaki, me te whakatikatika haumarutanga.

items.title: Mana Motuhake Tapa me te Hononga Kapua
items.detail: Ka haere tonu ngā mahi paetata takenui i te wā o te whakahekenga whatunga i te wā e tukutahi ana i te āhua ki ngā pūnaha kapua ina wātea.

items.title: Ngā Aronuinga Takahanga Kirimana
items.detail: Ka whakamahi ngā tīma pūrere me ngā tīma pūhara i ngā aronuinga whakahaere hei pupuri i te ōritetanga waeatanga puta noa i ngā putanga.

items.title: Haumarutanga Pūrere Whirinaki-Kore
items.detail: Ka whakaūngia te motuhēhēnga tahi, te iti rawa o te mana, me te kawenga whakamuna puta noa i ia tauwhitinga pūrere.

breakdown.title: Rautaki Pūrere & Edge
breakdown.summary: Ka tautuhia e mātou ngā tauira tūhonotanga, ngā paerewa wā whakahaere tapa, me te whakarato haumaru mō ngā pūrere āpure.
deliverables: Tauira urunga pūrere me te tūhonotanga
Mahere Edgeruntime me te tukunga
Tauanga haumarutanga ā-waka

breakdown.title: Ine Waea me te Papa Mana
breakdown.summary: Ka hangaia e mātou ngā paipa e hopu ana i ngā takahanga, e whakatauira ana i ngā māhanga mamati, e whakahohe ana i ngā rerengamahi mana mamao.
deliverables: Hoahoa aronuinga takahanga me te hoahoa aronuinga wā-tūturu
Whakatinanatanga tauira māhanga mamati me te tauira rawa
Apa API tono me te mana

breakdown.title: Ngā Mahi me te Tauine
breakdown.summary: Ka whakahaerehia e mātou te whakahaere rererangi me ngā mana whaikiko mō ngā taiao IoT tauine whakanao.
deliverables: Aroturuki me te matohi o te rererangi pūrere
Tautiakitanga matapae me te haurapa anomaly
Mahere tautoko takahuri, huringa ora hoki

cta.title: Tūhono i ō pūrere
cta.description: Hangaia he rongoā IoT pono kua rite mō ngā taiao whakanao tūturu.
